productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck With Big Ben Logo Pink T-shirt

The rugged placket on the chest coupled with the thickly embroidered Big Ben logo on the left chest enhances your regal style. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the slits at the shirt ends offer a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
